title: Transportation Adventure Coloring
description: A fun coloring activity featuring different modes of transportation that helps young children learn about vehicles while developing fine motor skills.
instructions: Color each vehicle using your favorite colors. Try to stay inside the lines. Talk about where each vehicle travels (road, sky, or tracks).

content.image: A simple scene showing three main vehicles: a car driving on a road, an airplane flying in the sky with clouds, and a train on railroad tracks. Each vehicle has simple, bold outlines perfect for young children to color.

elements.name: Car
elements.description: A friendly-looking car with four wheels driving on a road

elements.name: Airplane
elements.description: A smiling airplane with wings and windows flying among fluffy clouds

elements.name: Train
elements.description: A cheerful train with a few cars traveling on railroad tracks

learningFacts: Cars travel on roads and have wheels
Airplanes fly in the sky and have wings
Trains run on special tracks called railways
Transportation helps people and things move from one place to another
